headline: 211 unique addresses catalogued across 21 chains; 224 chain-role entries from docs, address book, governance docs, and explorers.

findings.text: Explorer grounding surfaced Aave V3 name-tagged Pool and PoolAddressesProvider pages on Ethereum, Arbitrum, Base, and Optimism; direct searchHandler endpoints were blocked and recorded in unknowns.
Official deployed-contracts page was located at the Aave docs addresses resource and points integrators to the Aave Address Book package.
Official security page and three audit report blob pages were fetched; no deployment-address scope tables were extracted from raw PDF bodies.
Aave Address Book v4.49.8 at commit f61c97628307d387ca93a78578970fe6db885029 was used for per-chain V3 deployment constants.
Multi-chain enumeration covered all 21 pinned chains via address-book chain files and Governance V3 deployed-contract tables.
PoolAddressesProvider was identified as the registry/factory/proxy-admin surface, but factory-discovered children were not enumerated through read API.
All admin_addresses roles use the controlled taxonomy leading token and actor_class is conservative when bytecode/Safe ownership was not read.
Every catalogued address traces to at least one fetched official docs, GitHub address-book, governance docs, DeFiPunkd, or explorer URL; unsupported snippet-only leaves were excluded.

rationale.verdict: Discovery grade is always unknown; this run walked the official docs, governance docs, security/audit links, Aave Address Book commit, selected explorers, and DeFiPunkd surfacers, cataloguing 211 unique addresses across 21 chains while leaving explorer search completeness and factory child enumeration unresolved. Pinned run context came from the uploaded per-protocol block :contentReference[oaicite:0]{index=0}.

evidence.shows: Capability probe and protocol overview: Aave describes itself as a decentralized, non-custodial liquidity protocol where suppliers provide liquidity and borrowers access over-collateralized liquidity; the page also links Documentation, Governance, Security, and Bug Bounty.
Capability probe for a pinned DeFiPunkd surfacer succeeded; the Ethereum address page rendered 0xa700691dA7b6769562170061709458FF21ed963e and reported no verified ABI.
Official Aave documentation landing page; describes Aave as a decentralized non-custodial liquidity protocol and links resource pages including Addresses.
Official deployed-contracts resource page; points integrators to the Aave Address Book package for Solidity/JavaScript contract addresses.

Official access-controls page lists Ethereum V3 Core Market contracts, ACLAdmin, and upgradeability status; derived: mixed upgradeability because the page marks some contracts governance-upgradable and others non-upgradeable.

Official PoolAddressesProvider docs describe it as the main registry/factory/proxy-admin for Pool and PoolConfigurator addresses, owned by Aave Governance, with view methods including getPool, getPoolConfigurator, getPriceOracle, getACLManager, and getACLAdmin.

Official Governance V3 docs describe AAVE-holder governance, payload timelocks, guardians, and deployed Governance V3 contracts across Ethereum, Arbitrum, Avalanche, BNB, Base, Gnosis, Metis, Optimism, Polygon, Scroll, zkSync, Linea, Soneium, and Plasma.
Aave governance forum landing page, used as the primary discussion forum URL.
Official security page lists audits and security resources for the Aave codebase.
GitHub blob page for Trail of Bits 2021-11 Aave V3 security review PDF; the blob page confirms the report file exists.
GitHub blob page for Sherlock 2025-02-15 Aave Public Audit Contest Report PDF; the blob page confirms the report file exists.
GitHub blob page for Sherlock 2026-02-05 Aave Labs Collaborative Audit Report PDF; the blob page confirms the report file exists.
Official Aave DAO address-book repository; README describes it as an up-to-date registry of Aave ecosystem smart-contract addresses.
Aave Address Book release v4.49.8, released May 1 2026, points to commit f61c976.
Content-addressing evidence for the Aave Address Book commit used for D4 deployment constants.

Package file listing for Aave Address Book v4.49.8; shows source files for AaveV3Ethereum, MegaEth, Arbitrum, Base, Plasma, Avalanche, BNB, Polygon, Mantle, Gnosis, Optimism, XLayer, Linea, Sonic, Celo, Scroll, ZkSync, Metis, Soneium, Fantom, and Harmony.
AaveV3Ethereum constants for PoolAddressesProvider, Pool, PoolConfigurator, AaveOracle, ACLAdmin, ACLManager, DataProvider, IncentivesController, EmissionManager, and Collector.
AaveV3Arbitrum constants for PoolAddressesProvider, Pool, PoolConfigurator, Oracle, PriceOracleSentinel, ACLAdmin, ACLManager, and DataProvider.
AaveV3Avalanche constants for PoolAddressesProvider, Pool, PoolConfigurator, Oracle, ACLAdmin, ACLManager, and DataProvider.
AaveV3Base constants for PoolAddressesProvider, Pool, PoolConfigurator, Oracle, PriceOracleSentinel, ACLAdmin, ACLManager, and DataProvider.
AaveV3BNB constants for PoolAddressesProvider, Pool, PoolConfigurator, Oracle, ACLAdmin, ACLManager, and DataProvider.
AaveV3Celo constants for PoolAddressesProvider, Pool, PoolConfigurator, Oracle, ACLAdmin, ACLManager, DataProvider, Collector, and other V3 support contracts.
AaveV3Fantom constants for PoolAddressesProvider, Pool, PoolConfigurator, Oracle, ACLAdmin, ACLManager, and DataProvider.
AaveV3Gnosis constants for PoolAddressesProvider, Pool, PoolConfigurator, Oracle, ACLAdmin, ACLManager, and DataProvider.
AaveV3Harmony constants for PoolAddressesProvider, Pool, PoolConfigurator, Oracle, ACLAdmin, ACLManager, and DataProvider.
AaveV3Mantle constants for PoolAddressesProvider, Pool, PoolConfigurator, Oracle, PriceOracleSentinel, ACLAdmin, ACLManager, and DataProvider.
AaveV3MegaEth constants for PoolAddressesProvider, Pool, PoolConfigurator, Oracle, ACLAdmin, ACLManager, and DataProvider.
AaveV3Sonic constants for PoolAddressesProvider, Pool, PoolConfigurator, Oracle, ACLAdmin, ACLManager, and DataProvider.
AaveV3XLayer constants for PoolAddressesProvider, Pool, PoolConfigurator, Oracle, ACLAdmin, ACLManager, and DataProvider.
AaveV3Linea constants for PoolAddressesProvider, Pool, PoolConfigurator, Oracle, ACLAdmin, and ACLManager.
AaveV3Metis constants for PoolAddressesProvider, Pool, PoolConfigurator, Oracle, PriceOracleSentinel, and ACLAdmin.
AaveV3Optimism constants for PoolAddressesProvider, Pool, PoolConfigurator, Oracle, and ACLAdmin.
AaveV3Polygon constants for PoolAddressesProvider, Pool, PoolConfigurator, Oracle, and ACLAdmin.
AaveV3Scroll constants for PoolAddressesProvider, Pool, PoolConfigurator, Oracle, ACLAdmin, and ACLManager.
AaveV3ZkSync constants for PoolAddressesProvider, Pool, PoolConfigurator, Oracle, and ACLAdmin.

Etherscan explorer page is name-tagged Aave: Pool V3 for the Ethereum Pool address.
Etherscan explorer page is name-tagged Aave: Pool Address Provider V3 for the Ethereum PoolAddressesProvider address.
Arbiscan explorer page is name-tagged Aave: Pool V3 for the Arbitrum Pool address and shows neighboring Aave reserve-token labels.
BaseScan explorer page is name-tagged Aave: Pool Proxy Base and identifies it as an upgradeability proxy with implementation 0xDb578D67...4F6C1c3e4.
Optimistic Etherscan explorer page is name-tagged Aave: Pool V3 for the Optimism Pool address.
DeFiPunkd read surfacer for the Ethereum AAVE token renders name() as Aave Token, symbol() as AAVE, and totalSupply().
Official aave-dao/aave-v3-origin repository; README identifies it as the Aave v3.6 complete codebase and lists Aave v3.X audit procedures.
Official aave-dao/aave-governance-v3 repository for Aave Governance V3.
Official aave-dao/aave-permissions-book repository; page describes it as a tool to index and visualize permissions across the Aave smart-contract ecosystem.

unknowns: D1: direct searchHandler URLs for etherscan.io, arbiscan.io, basescan.org, and polygonscan.com were safe-open rejected after normalization to term=Aave+V3; explorer-tag enumeration therefore relies on fetched explorer pages/search grounding and is not exhaustive across every pinned chain.
D3: raw PDF fetches for Trail of Bits and Sherlock audit reports returned web-tool internal fetch failures, so first-5-page PDF scope-address extraction was not completed.
D4: Foundry broadcast and hardhat-deploy artifact folders were not exhaustively walked; deployment extraction used the official Aave Address Book commit instead.

D6: PoolAddressesProvider factory children were not enumerated via DeFiPunkd read API; constructed getPool/getPoolConfigurator/getACLManager calls were safe-open rejected and no allPools-style child list was available.

D8: reserve aToken, variable-debt-token, stable-debt-token, and collateral-manager leaves seen only as explorer snippets were intentionally not inserted unless a full fetched official docs/address-book/explorer page supported the address.

protocol_metadata.about: Aave V3 is a non-custodial liquidity protocol where users supply assets to earn interest and borrow assets against over-collateralized positions. Its V3 market surface is organized around per-chain Pool proxies, PoolAddressesProvider registries, PoolConfigurator/admin contracts, oracle infrastructure, and governance-timelocked payload execution across supported chains.
